era_resolution: The Second Council of Nicaea (787 AD) which reaffirmed the use of icons in the Eastern Orthodox Church, leading to a temporary resolution but ongoing theological and political tensions.
modern_resolution: Implementing a multidisciplinary approach combining historical, theological, and social analysis to foster dialogue and understanding between differing viewpoints, enhanced by modern tools of communication and conflict resolution.

biblical_tie.context: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.

protocol: UESP Apex Protocol 001: Initiating Interfaith Dialogue and Historical Reconciliation Initiative (IDHRI) to address systemic friction and promote peaceful resolution.
